data.name: Fairy Tale Academy
data.detailed_description:
Fairy Tale Academy is an adult adventure RPG game set in the land of fairy tales. Loosely inspired by the Harry Potter and Witcher series you are thrust into the world as a new student at the famous Lawnstar Academy. A school of witches, wizards and hunters.

Upon enrollment, you are assigned to your group which includes three other students of remarkable skill and talents.

Together you must work to become to greatest hunters the world has ever seen.

Each student has a special power of their own to aid in their battles.
You have been luckily given the power of dimensional control.

Train your skills, travel the world and rise to the top as the most powerful student.
​

data.short_description: Join a school of Witchcraft and Wizardry in this adult RPG adventure game.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X
  • 處理器: Pentium III 500mhz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
